reviews.review_description: Just got the app yesterday and in no time checked it out.  Took the risk of purchasing it because $0.99 was not going to break the bank but, the impression of the app is mixed.  The concept of bringing historical events through time periods is neat, but the app is really short in topics and short in satisfying my interest and curiosity for historical events.  Hopefully more topics will be added as to make the app a better one.

If that’s all you’re showing is a little square part of the story it’s not worth getting get the story together.  Get at least until the beginning to the ending of the story , you can break it down . And I need more than that .  ￼Not even worth $.99. ￼😕
I wish the vr had more history stuff. Just wish this one would unlock the rest already. I've had my VR for about 6months and still nothing

Love this educational piece for what it is at the moment. 

Well worth the price. 

It would be a shame if this educational piece isn't fully realized 

I will keep checking for more content

So far the 3 that are unlocked have been really good. I keep looking to see if anymore are unlocked but months have gone by and it's the same 3. Any chance there will be more developers? As they are so interesting and great to explore.
Beautiful concept but very very very bad executions.......

reviews.review_title: Never seen anything like this before
reviews.review_description: This VR time travel game is amazing! You can teleport to three different environments (the others are "coming soon,"). The narrator provides great historical context, adding to the experience. It would be great to have more interaction, but it's a fantastic way to explore history. I can't wait to see what comes next. Highly recommend for history buffs!

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback, we'll bring more soon!

reviews.review_description: The whole concept is really interesting however being AR is actually distracting and less immersive. Also, the clips were not long enough nor really active  ( to the most the 3D technology). It would  way more interest to be able view the events from different anglesor viewpoints . Thic could really develop into an educational tool to teach kids what actually happen with first hand experience . I think to do you that need the enhance the spactial sound and make it more cinematic while still being accurate. It could also be a useful theory tool for those people with memory issues , take them back London in the 1960's or New York  in 1970's  or special event like Live Aid

This is a really nice educational experience. It is covering several important events in history. At the moment events like the JFK assassiation, the D-Day or the moon landing are beeing covered. The devs illustrated those events with the usage of a melange of 3D-animated sceneries and original footage. The clips are at the moment a bit short, but the app is still under construction and for now free therefore I am pretty satisfied. 

Some infos about the event is beeing told by a narrator. The voice acting of the narrator is really professional and good. I am looking forward to follow this project further. Thank you devs for making a VR-documentary, we need more of those :) (Looking forward to the dinosaurs)

Very small sample of what Victor has to offer
3 small pieces of history as if we were there.
Mixed Reality was very good and immersive.
I do want to see some more time line history events.

developer_response.body: Thank you for your feedback—more content is on its way!

reviews.review_description: I gave it a try and really like how it takes you back to important history events from the past. I can’t wait to see what else you add to make this even more enjoyable. Great work.
